likely_response.local: O pagamento é feito no balcão, junto à caixa.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW puh-guh-MAYNG-too EH FAY-too NOO bahl-KOWN, ZHOONNG-too AH KEYE-shuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Where can I pay the bill? The payment is made at the counter, by the cash register.

responses.english: Where can I pay the bill? The payment is made at the counter, by the cash register.
responses.phonetic: AW puh-guh-MAYNG-too EH FAY-too NOO bahl-KOWN, ZHOONNG-too AH KEYE-shuh.
responses.french: O pagamento é feito no balcão, junto à caixa.

likely_response.local: Pode pagar no balcão ou com um dos funcionários.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih puh-GAHR NOO bahl-KOWN OHW KOHM OONNG DOOSH foonng-seeoo-NAH-reeoosh.
likely_response.translation_en: You can pay at the counter or with one of the staff.

responses.english: You can pay at the counter or with one of the staff.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih puh-GAHR NOO bahl-KOWN OHW KOHM OONNG DOOSH foonng-seeoo-NAH-reeoosh.
responses.french: Pode pagar no balcão ou com um dos funcionários.

likely_response.local: Pode pagar no balcão, com o garçom ou com o caixa.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih puh-GAHR NOO bahl-KOWN, KOHM AW guh-ruh-SOHNG OHW KOHM AW KEYE-shuh.
likely_response.translation_en: You can pay at the counter, with the waiter, or with the cashier.

responses.english: You can pay at the counter, with the waiter, or with the cashier.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih puh-GAHR NOO bahl-KOWN, KOHM AW guh-ruh-SOHNG OHW KOHM AW KEYE-shuh.
responses.french: Pode pagar no balcão, com o garçom ou com o caixa.
